notes: The output is a single amorphous blob outline that fails to resolve the four distinct squid in the photo into individual mantles, arms, or tentacles, reading as a generic shape rather than the input subjects.
specific_issues: silhouette merges all four squid into one undifferentiated blob
no individual mantle outlines or fin separation
arms and tentacles are entirely absent — no crown, no club, no suckers
eyes are reduced to tiny dots floating in the wrong locations relative to the photo
no almond-shaped eye with filled pupil as in FAO plates
stipple is randomly scattered rather than concentrated on chromatophore fields
internal contour lines are arbitrary and do not correspond to anatomy
no fin outline traced along the mantle
does not read as an FAO scientific plate — reads as a featureless silhouette trace
